goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'chinese' food and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should be in the 'south'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be 'in the same area as the restaurant'.
The hotel should be in the 'same price range as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve chinese food and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should be in the south
Make sure you get address and phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the same area as the restaurant
The hotel should be in the same price range as the restaurant
Make sure you get whether they have internet
